home.subtitle: Hage ay AI ku taageerto midawga qoyska iyo taageerada qaxootiga

auth.loginSuccess: Si guul leh ayaad u gashay
auth.loginError: Magaca isticmaalaha ama furaha sirta waa khalad

onboarding.step2Desc: Naga caawi si aan u fahanno xaaladaada
onboarding.step4Desc: Kani waa hagidda khaaska ah ee kuu togan
onboarding.refugee: Waxaan ahay qaxooti ama codsade asayl
onboarding.familyMember: Waxaa ii jira qoys dibadda ah oo aan doonayo inaan la midawgo
onboarding.supporter: Waxaan ahay shaqaale arrimaha bulshada ama taageere
onboarding.ngo: Waxaan ka matalaa urur aan dowlad ahayn

registration.title: Diiwaan-gelinta Qaxootiga
registration.subtitle: Diiwaangeli shakhsiyaadka iyo qoysaska si ay ugu helaan taageerada iyo adeegyada midawga qoyska

findSupport.title: Raadi Taageero
findSupport.subtitle: La xiriir qareenada, NGO-yada, hay'adaha dowladda, iyo adeegyada taageerada
findSupport.searchPlaceholder: Raadi magaca, adeegga, ama erayga furaha...
findSupport.emergency: Khatar degdeg ah miyaad ku jirtaa?

pathways.title: Jidadka
pathways.subtitle: Baadh jidadka la heli karo ee midawga qoyska, waxbarashada, shaqada, iyo deeqsanaanta

uasc.title: Carruurta Aan La Raacin iyo Kala Qaybsanaanta (UASC)
uasc.subtitle: Taageero gaar ah iyo hagid loogu talagalay carruurta yaryar ee aan la raacin
uasc.accessGateDesc: Qaybtani waxay u taagan tahay dadka waaweyn ee mas'uulka ah, shaqaalaha arrimaha bulshada, iyo taageerayaasha oggolaansan kaliya.
